title: Better Beacon Effects
description:
This mod brings back the beacon from the 1.4.2 snapshot 12w36a.

This mod also adds different effects that can be applied to the beacon by placing a block next to it.
body:
This mod brings back the beacon from the 1.4.2 snapshot 12w36a.

This mod also adds different effects that can be applied to the beacon by placing a block next to it.


Some of the following block effects include:

 - Glass | Shows the effect checking area Must be placed on top of the beacon (Removed in 1.18.1)

 - Command Block | Debug Offset

 - Purpur Block | Fading effect

 - Quartz Block | Spinning beam

 - Obsidian | Rainbow color

 - Redstone Block | Remove a beam

 - Slime Block | Add a beam

 - Observer | Add texture

 - Sea Lantern | Makes the beacon beam spin

 - Prismarine | Makes the beam more opaque

 - Lapis Block | offsets the beam by 1 on the x and z axis

 - Coal Block | offsets the beam by -1 on the x and z axis

 - End Stone | Magic effect 

 - Waxed Copper Block | LASER Effect 

 - End Stone Bricks | Colorable Magic Effect

 - White Wool | Air Effect

 - Orange Wool | Fire Effect

 - Blue Wool | Water Effect

 - Brown Wool | Earth Effect



A video explanation can be found here: https://youtu.be/JIhTT2e5q6o



You can use this in any mod pack, just please give me credit.



You can make a YouTube video about this, just please give me credit.



The latest source code is now on github!

https://github.com/AlexDorian7/BetterBeaconEffects

THIS IS A CLIENT MOD!
It only needs to be on the client side.

A fabric version is comming soon!
